translations.**Matters/簡書…之類**\n跟 Medium 平台差不多，因我不考慮盈:
**Matters/Jianshu… etc.**  
Similar to the Medium platform, not suitable since I don't consider monetization.
translations.**SEO 結構基本為零**\n「驚不驚喜、益不意外?」Google 自己的服務:
**SEO structure is basically zero**  
"Surprised or not?" Google's own service has SEO structure as bad as 💩, offering no customization for head meta (description/tag/og:). Forget about SEO ranking; just sharing the site on Line/Facebook shows no preview info, only an ugly URL and site name.
translations.**程式碼高亮功能缺陷**\n功能只有 `Code Block 底色反灰顯示`:
**Code Highlighting Limitations**  
The feature only provides a `gray background for Code Blocks` without color syntax highlighting. To embed Gists, you must use Embed JavaScript (iframe), but Google Site does not handle this well. The iframe height does not adjust with the page, resulting in either too much blank space or dual scrollbars on small mobile screens, which looks ugly and is hard to read.
translations.**自架 WordPress**\n很久以前租過主機、網域，使用 WordPre:
**Self-hosted WordPress**  
A long time ago, I rented hosting and a domain to build a personal website using WordPress. After setting it up, customizing the layout I liked, installing plugins, and even developing missing plugins myself, I lost the motivation to write. It felt bulky, and the loading speed and SEO were not as good as Medium. Spending more time tweaking it would only reduce my motivation to write further.
translations.*也可點左下角的「眼睛」，控制本頁是否要顯示頁尾資訊*\n\n: *You can also click the "eye" icon at the bottom left to control whether to display the footer information on this page*
translations.*但如上述致命缺點所說，嵌入 iframe 無法依照網頁大小響應高度。*\n\n: *But as mentioned in the critical drawbacks above, embedding iframes cannot adjust their height responsively according to the page size.*
translations.*若出現 **「網頁無法開啟」** 別急！請再稍等一下，如果超過 1 小時都還是: *If you see **"Page cannot be opened"**, don’t worry! Please wait a little longer. If it still doesn’t open after more than 1 hour, then go back and check if there are any errors in the settings.*
translations.*若出現 **「驗證資源失敗」** 別急！請再稍等一下，如果超過 1 小時都還是: *If you see **"Verification of resource failed"**, don't worry! Please wait a little longer. If it still doesn't work after more than 1 hour, then go back and check if the settings are correct.*

translations.- Customizable pages available\n\n- A sm:
- Customizable pages available

- A smooth writing interface like Medium

- Interactive Features (Like/Comment/Follow)

- Good SEO structure

- Lightweight and fast loading

- Can bind your own domain

- Low Intrusiveness (Ad Intrusiveness, Website Branding)

- Easy to Build
translations.- [[Productivity Tools] Abandoning Chrom: - [[Productivity Tools] Abandoning Chrome for the Sidekick Browser](../118e924a1477/)
translations.1. **Code Highlighting Limitations** \n:
1. **Code Highlighting Limitations**  
   The feature only provides a `gray background for Code Blocks` without color syntax highlighting. To embed Gists, you must use Embed JavaScript (iframe), but Google Site does not handle this well. The iframe height does not adjust with the page, resulting in either too much blank space or dual scrollbars on small mobile screens, which looks ugly and is hard to read.

2. **SEO structure is basically zero**  
   "Surprised or not?" Google's own service has SEO structure as bad as 💩, offering no customization for head meta (description/tag/og:). Forget about SEO ranking; just sharing the site on Line/Facebook shows no preview info, only an ugly URL and site name.
translations.1. **Self-hosted WordPress** \n A lon:
1. **Self-hosted WordPress**  
   A long time ago, I rented hosting and a domain to build a personal website using WordPress. After setting it up, customizing the layout I liked, installing plugins, and even developing missing plugins myself, I lost the motivation to write. It felt bulky, and the loading speed and SEO were not as good as Medium. Spending more time tweaking it would only reduce my motivation to write further.

2. **Matters/Jianshu… etc.**  
   Similar to the Medium platform, not suitable since I don't consider monetization.

3. wix/weebly are too focused on commercial websites, and their free versions are too intrusive.

4. **Google Site (This Article)**

5. Github Pages + Jekyll

6. **Still searching >>> Suggestions are welcome**

translations.什麼都先別說，先來看我做的成品，如果你也「心有靈犀」可以考慮使用看看！\n\n: Don't say anything for now, just take a look at what I made. If you feel the same way, you might consider giving it a try!
translations.再導航列目錄子頁面會自動聚集顯示\n\n: Subpages in the navigation bar will automatically group and display.
translations.再新增一筆紀錄，類型選「 **CNAME Record** 」、主機輸入「 **: Add a new record, select the type "**CNAME Record**", enter "**www (or your desired subdomain)**" for the host, and enter "**ghs.googlehosted.com.**" for the value, then click Add to submit.
translations.列舉一些自己在使用上遇到＆解決的問題；其他都是所見即所得的操作，沒有什麼好紀錄的: List some problems you encountered and solved during use; everything else is WYSIWYG operation and not worth recording.
translations.去年換工作時，很「虛花」的註冊了個 [域名](http://www.zhgchg: When I changed jobs last year, I somewhat "impulsively" registered a [domain](http://www.zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"} to serve as a personal resume redirect link. After six months, I thought about making the domain more useful by adding more information. On the other hand, I was also looking for a second website to back up the articles I published on Medium, just in case.
translations.可指定橫幅訊息內容、顏色、按鈕文字、點擊前往連結、是否在新分頁開啟、設定全站 o: You can specify the banner message content, color, button text, link URL, whether to open in a new tab, and set it to display site-wide or only on the homepage.
translations.可新增頁面用拖曳的方式拖到現有頁面下就會變成子頁面、或點擊「…」操作。\n\n: You can add a new page by dragging it under an existing page to make it a subpage, or by clicking the "…" for options.
translations.可檢查變更內容並發布。\n\n: You can review the changes and publish.
translations.可設定是否讓搜尋引擎收錄及取消每次發布都要先跳檢查內容頁。\n\n: You can set whether to allow search engines to index the site and disable the content check prompt before each publish.
translations.可輸入 JavaScript/HTML/CSS，可拿來做自訂樣式的 Button: You can input JavaScript/HTML/CSS to create custom styled Button UI.
translations.右方切換到「頁面」頁籤。\n\n: Switch to the "Pages" tab on the right.
translations.在 DNS 設定區塊新增一筆紀錄，類型選「 **TXT Record** 」、主: Add a new record in the DNS settings section, select the type as "**TXT Record**", enter "**@**" for the host, and paste the **copied DNS verification string** as the value, then click Add to submit.
translations.大約 2010 年時有用過舊版的 Google Site，當初拿來做個人網站的: Around 2010, I used the old version of Google Site to create a personal website -> a file download center page. My memory is a bit vague, but I recall the layout was bulky and the interface was not smooth. After 10 years, I thought the service was discontinued, but I accidentally saw domain investors using it as a domain parking page to display contact info for sales:
translations.我覺得 Google Site 只適合非常輕量的網頁服務，例如學校社團、小活動的: I think Google Site is only suitable for very lightweight web services, such as school clubs, small event pages, or personal resumes.
translations.指派成功後關閉設定視窗，點擊右上角的「 **發布** 」發布。\n\n: After successfully assigning, close the settings window and click "**Publish**" at the top right to publish.
translations.新 Google Site 個人網站建立經驗及設定教學\n\n: Experience and Setup Guide for Creating a Personal Website with the New Google Site
translations.新增頁首後滑鼠移到左下角就能變更圖片、輸入標題文字、變更標頭類型\n\n: After adding a header, moving the mouse to the bottom left corner allows you to change the image, enter title text, and change the header type.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: For any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.查了下官方社群，目前不行，按鈕的連結就只能 1.輸入外部連結在新視窗中開啟或 2: After checking the official community, it's currently not possible. Button links can only 1. open an external link in a new window or 2. link to an internal page. So, I ended up splitting the menu using subpages.
translations.滑鼠移到導航列，選擇「 **新增頁首** 」\n\n: Hover over the navigation bar and select "**Add Header**"
translations.滑鼠移到頁面底部，選擇「 **編輯頁尾** 」即可輸入頁尾資訊。\n\n: Hover the mouse at the bottom of the page and select "**Edit footer**" to enter footer information.
translations.目前已透過我自己撰寫的 [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://: I have used my own tool, [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}, to download Medium articles in bulk and convert them to Markdown format for migration to Jekyll.
translations.第一眼看到的時候覺得「哇！視覺不錯，居然為了賣網域弄了個頁面」；仔細一下左下角浮: At first glance, I thought, "Wow! The visuals are nice, and they even made a page just to sell domains." Then I noticed the cursor at the bottom left and realized, "Wow! This was built with Google Site," which is completely different from the interface I used 10 years ago. After checking, I found out that Google Site never stopped its service; instead, it launched a brand-new version in 2016. Although it's been almost five years, the interface is at least up to date!
translations.節省閱讀時間，我 **先講結論；我依然在尋找更合適的服務選項** ，雖然他有在持: To save reading time, **here is the conclusion first; I am still looking for a better service option**. Although Google Site is continuously maintained and updated, it fails to meet several key needs important to me. Below are the critical drawbacks I encountered while using it.
translations.解決辦法只有拿掉檔案上傳的問題，就能直接在頁面內進行填寫了。\n\n: The only solution is to remove the file upload issue, allowing direct form filling on the page.
translations.跟 Medium 一樣的流暢寫作介面\n: A smooth writing interface like Medium
translations.輸入路徑名稱（EX: dev -> http://www.zhgchg.li/d: Enter the path name (e.g., dev -> http://www.zhgchg.li/dev)
translations.這個原因是因為表單題目中有「 **檔案上傳** 」項目， [因瀏覽器安全性問題無: This is because the form contains a "**File Upload**" item, which [cannot be embedded in other pages via iframe due to browser security restrictions](https://support.google.com/sites/thread/24853300?hl=en){:target="_blank"}; therefore, only the survey information is shown, and users must click the fill button to open a new window to complete the form.
translations.選擇屬性可自訂頁面路徑。\n\n: Select the property to customize the page path.
translations.類似 wix/weebly..or cakeresume? 版面配置、元件拉一拉: Similar to wix/weebly.. or cakeresume? Layout and components just drag and drop to complete!
translations.點擊右上角「 **齒輪(設定)** 」選擇「 **公告橫幅** 」即可設定，設定: Click the "**Gear (Settings)**" icon at the top right and select "**Announcement Banner**" to set it up. Don't forget to return to the page and click "**Publish**" for the changes to take effect!
translations.點擊右上角「 **齒輪(設定)** 」選擇「 **分析** 」輸入「 **GA: Click the "**Gear (Settings)**" icon at the top right, select "**Analytics**," and enter your "**GA Tracking ID**" to set it up. Don't forget to go back to the page and click "**Publish**" for the changes to take effect!
translations.點擊右上角「 **齒輪(設定)** 」選擇「 **品牌圖片** 」即可設定，設定: Click the "**Gear (Settings)**" icon at the top right and select "**Brand Image**" to set it up. Don't forget to go back to the page and click "**Publish**" for the changes to take effect!
translations.點擊右上角「 **齒輪(設定)** 」選擇「 **檢視者工具** 」即可設定，設: Click the "**Gear (Settings)**" icon at the top right and select "**Viewer Tools**" to configure. Don’t forget to go back to the page and click "**Publish**" for the changes to take effect!
translations.點擊右上角「 **齒輪(設定)** 」選擇「 **自訂網址** 」輸入想要指派的: Click the gear icon (Settings) in the top right corner, select "Custom URL," enter the domain name or subdomain you want to assign, then click "Assign."
